items.summary: A lightweight, model-agnostic multi-agent orchestration harness that lets a coordinator LLM spawn external worker CLIs (Codex, Gemini, Claude Code, Grok Build, Antigravity, opencode, pi, OpenHands) as tool-use actions.

items.title: Google's "Frozen v2" chip reportedly bakes Gemini's architecture directly into silicon for efficiency gains
items.summary: Google is developing "Frozen v2," a server chip that bakes the Gemini architecture directly into hardware. According to internal sources, it could be 6 to 10 times more efficient than current TPUs. Scheduled for 2028, the chip would drastically cut Google's AI inference costs and could give the company a price advantage over OpenAI and An...
